case_title: ALL-PRO BAIL BONDS, INC. VS. SHALONDA ANTOINETTE KING

docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURN MAIL RE: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. PER USPS " RETURN TO SENDER, ILLEGIBLE, UNABLE TO FORWARD.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $75.00 SERVED MAY-17-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KING, SHALONDA ANTOINETTE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-30-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-30-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. PLAINTIFF ALL-PRO BAIL BONDS, INC., APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY JESSE MARQUEZ, COLLECTOR. DEFENDANT SHALONDA ANTOINETTE KING APPEARED. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALL-PRO BAIL BONDS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KING, SHALONDA ANTOINETTE $1,960.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,085.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
